name: Memoh
description: ✨ The open-source multi-agent platform. Every agent gets its own computer, desktop, network, and long-term memory.  You can bring your own key, or host your coding agent like Claude Code, Codex and so on.
summaryZh: ✨ The open-source multi-agent platform. Every agent gets its own computer, desktop, network, and long-term memory.  You can bring your own key, or host your coding agent like Claude Code, Codex and so on. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
